## Checklist

- [ ] Follows `docs/STANDARDS.md`
- [ ] Tests added/updated (and passing locally on your OS)
- [ ] `ruff check .` clean
- [ ] `black --check .` clean
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] ADR written if this is an architectural decision (`docs/reference/ADR/`)
- [ ] No `except Exception: pass` added
- [ ] Live runtime path (if touched): no network I/O, no inference, no variable latency
